summary: Completed frontend testing of voice selection flow in ChatPage. All 11 features tested and passed: Problem selection navigates directly to /chat (not /voice-select), voice selection prompt shows two large avatar cards (Miron & Oksana), clicking either avatar shows correct greeting message with consultant name, header avatars highlight/dim correctly after selection, input field enables after voice selection, TTS speaker button appears on greeting message.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatPage.jsx correctly implements voice selection flow with voiceChosen state
GREETINGS constant properly defines different messages for male (Мирон) and female (Оксана)
Voice selection prompt (xc-voice-select-prompt) shows two large avatar cards with data-testid attributes
Header avatars correctly toggle between xc-avatar-selectable, xc-avatar-active, and xc-avatar-dim classes
Input field and buttons properly disabled before voice selection via disabled={!voiceChosen}
ProblemSelection.jsx correctly navigates to /chat (line 41) instead of /voice-select
TTS greeting audio pre-caching implemented for both voices
seed_data_creation: None needed - guest auth auto-creates user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice selection flow fully verified. Flow: Landing → Problems → Chat (with voice selection prompt). Voice selection can be done via large avatar cards (voice-pick-miron, voice-pick-oksana) or header avatars (avatar-miron-btn, avatar-oksana-btn). After selection: greeting message appears with correct consultant name, selected avatar highlighted (blue border), other avatar dimmed, input enabled. Back button navigates to /problems.

problem_selection_navigation.problem_cards_clickable: PASS - All problem cards trigger navigation

voice_selection_prompt.prompt_hidden_after_selection: PASS - Removed from DOM after voice chosen

miron_voice_selection.greeting_text_correct: PASS - 'Здравствуйте, я Мирон — ваш личный консультант...'

oksana_voice_selection.greeting_text_correct: PASS - 'Здравствуйте, я Оксана — ваш личный консультант...'

header_avatar_states.selected_avatar_highlighted: PASS - xc-avatar-active class with blue border
header_avatar_states.header_avatars_clickable: PASS - Can select voice via header avatars

input_state.mic_button_enabled: PASS - Mic button enabled after selection

mocked_apis.stripe_webhooks: MOCKED - Stripe webhook processing is mocked
